question: On Tuesday, how does the revenue from Takeout compare to the revenue from Dinner?

options.A: Takeout revenue is about twice the Dinner revenue
options.B: Takeout revenue is slightly higher than Dinner revenue
options.C: Takeout revenue is about the same as Dinner revenue
options.D: Takeout revenue is lower than Dinner revenue

explanation: The y-axis starts at 1200 instead of 0, which compresses the visible differences between stacked totals. That can make Lunch look as large as (or larger than) Takeout even though the totals favor Takeout.
